To sum it up, in the first match they disconnected with 1 minute left to play, and right then we scored a goal. We checked the rules properly and, since they had proof of the disconnection, we resumed the match, setting it to 1:00 remaining and then playing overtime.

That’s why there are 3 screenshots in total: 1 is the first part of the first match (the one with the disconnection), 2 is the second part (when we resumed the match), and 3 is the second match.It was just to avoid overcomplicating things because we had already explained it, but anyway, no problem.
